title: Oasis (moon)

'''Oasis'''<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|234|''Kuari Princess''}}</ref> was a [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] orbiting an [[Unnamed planet (Oasis colony)|unnamed planet]] in a [[Unidentified system (Oasis)|star system]] located within the [[Maelstrom Nebula/Legends|Maelstrom Nebula]]. The moon was home to the [[Oasis mining colony]], a thriving settlement where [[Oxite]] was mined. Both [[Rodin Higron]]'s [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] had a base here during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Some time after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Riders of the Maelstrom]] [[Battle of Oasis|attacked]] the moon and attempted to crash the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] into Higron's base.<ref name="RotM" />

==Behind the scenes==
The unlicensed—and thus non-canon—roleplaying magazine article "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]" attributes the [[Oasis system]] to the ''[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|Riders of the Maelstrom]]'' adventure scenario<ref name="VSF13">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> which was the first source to mention the [[Oasis mining colony]] moon,<ref name="RotM" /> and places the system in [[Relgim sector/Legends|Relgim sector]].<ref name="VSF13" />
